summary: Tested Ground0 WAIT/NO-GO email capture feature. All 6 backend tests pass. All frontend data-testids and copy text verified via source code inspection.

issues: Test requirement specified /ground-0 but actual route is /ground-0-briefing (landing page) — lesson player is embedded in portal. Non-breaking, existing behavior.

critical_code_review_comments: CompleteView shares captureFirstName/captureEmail/captureSubmitted state between WAIT and NO-GO — if user switches decision (unusual), state could bleed. Low risk since decision is final after selection.
ground0/waitlist endpoint rejects GO status (400) — correct behavior since GO uses /go-email-capture separately.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all data-testids and copy verified in source)

frontend_source_verification.WAIT headline: PRESENT (line 1259): 'You're Not Ready Yet — But You Don't Have To Start Over'
frontend_source_verification.NO-GO headline: PRESENT (line 1350): 'You're Not Cleared to Proceed Right Now'

context_for_next_testing_agent: Ground0 WAIT/NO-GO capture forms fully implemented and verified. Backend endpoints /api/ground0/waitlist (WAIT, NO-GO) and /api/go-email-capture all return {ok: true}. All data-testids match spec. Actual lesson player route is /ground-0-briefing, not /ground-0.
